justification: Both extractions are functionally identical in their skill lists (HTML, CSS, Python, Git), correctly set experience_level='student', years_of_experience=0, is_student=true, and return empty projects and impact_highlights. Both provide appropriate confidence notes acknowledging beginner levels and the self-reported nature of Git. Neither hallucinates skills nor over-extracts. The only difference is that A includes a more detailed confidence_metrics structure, but this does not meaningfully improve accuracy or correctness on any of the four scored dimensions. All four dimension scores are within 0 points of each other, making this a genuine tie.
